title: parabiazomai #3849
definition:
1) to employ force contrary to nature and right
 2) to compel by employing force
 3) to constrain one by entreaties
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to employ force contrary to nature and right
 2) to compel by employing force
 3) to constrain one by entreaties

    NASB:  to force against (nature):
